description: Two RNA Orzhov Afterlife cards that wave-79 enrichment passed (vision + trivia, ip_verified canonical Orzhov-watermark guild operatives) but that nobody attached to the parent faction node. Grasping Thrull is the Orzhov-thrull-from-debtor-flesh print (canonical Mourning Thrull lore citation in trivia); Knight of the Last Breath is the Orzhov-Giant-Knight Afterlife-3 enforcer (canonical sealed-helm anonymity + sacrifice-economy citation in trivia). Both cards already carry orzhov in tags_hub and Afterlife in oracle_text. The attach is mechanical — they belong, the node exists, the existing 10-card orzhov-syndicate appears_on roster was just missing two RNA prints that should have shipped with the 2019 RNA wave. Brief discipline: ONE 1:N attach operation, no new node, no new sub-shape vocabulary. Branch topology (parent fans to two new children), no chain or triangle commission.
citations: [Scryfall: Grasping Thrull — RNA flavor text 'Debt due! Debt due!' + Afterlife reminder text]
[Scryfall: Knight of the Last Breath — RNA Afterlife 3 + sacrifice activated ability]
[Wizards: magic.wizards.com Ravnica Allegiance Mechanics — Afterlife as the Orzhov 'supernatural staying power' keyword]
[MTG Wiki: Orzhov Syndicate — guild membership includes thrulls (constructed labor) and Giant Knight contractors]
[cards/_characters/orzhov-syndicate.md — existing parent node, 10-card roster prior to this attach]
other_candidates_considered: 1:1 mirror between Grasping Thrull and Knight of the Last Breath via ## Connections sections — Knight already has Grasping Thrull in its Related cards line 64 + Tithe Taker + Teysa Karlov; symmetric mirror was plausible but lower-yield than the parent-attach (parent-attach gives both cards graph-reachable from orzhov-syndicate's appears_on, which the 1:1 does not).
Theros-pantheon extensions (Woe Strider, Kragma Warcaller) — deferred, no evidence those cards are wave-79 vision+trivia-passed at the moment; would need a queue check before commissioning.

Dalakos Crafter of Wonders (THB-212) — single anchor named character, sub-threshold per [[nicol-bolas]] / [[piccolo-jr]] / [[krillin]] 3-anchor commissioning rule. Stage: when ≥2 additional Dalakos-canonical THB prints surface, commission solo character node.
notes: Both cards are Orzhov-watermarked RNA commons/uncommons with Afterlife — the canonical 2019 guild-keyword. Per orzhov-syndicate node's What this node anchors section, 'guild operatives, undead vampires, thrulls (constructed labor), tax-collector knights' — both prints sit cleanly inside the existing membership predicate.
Grasping Thrull is the third Orzhov-thrull-from-debtor print at the parent node, joining Kingpin's Pet (GTC-173) and the implicit Mourning Thrull (Guildpact, not in inventory but trivia-cited).

Knight of the Last Breath is the second Orzhov-knight print at the parent node, joining Charity Extractor (WAR-81). The Giant Knight typing is the canonical contracted-Giant-as-Orzhov-enforcer flavor beat — institutional reach beyond the priesthood tier.
Substrate counter unchanged: 84 nodes pre / 84 nodes post. No new node, no node dissolved. Roster of triple-hub corpus unchanged. The 0-drift state holds.
No related_hubs change on orzhov-syndicate (already [labor]); no new triple-hub attribution; no new structural-primitive vocabulary. Pattern noted in prose, not graduated.
